metadata.title: AquaVir-KB: A Comprehensive Knowledge Base for Aquatic Invertebrate Viruses
metadata.description: AquaVir-KB is a literature-traceable knowledge base for aquatic invertebrate viruses, containing 1,647 virus species across 8 phyla, 14,540 target viral isolates, 27,096 proteins, and 353,160 structured evidence records text-mined from 9,065 publications. The database provides multi-dimensional evidence stratification (origin, strength, curation status), ICTV-aligned taxonomy, protein functional annotation, phylogenetic classification, and geographic distribution data.
